description_long: This is a large military-style cargo truck with a camouflage paint scheme, featuring a covered rear cargo area supported by a frame and canvas tarp. The truck has a robust, boxy cab with two side mirrors and a front grille, and is equipped with six large, rugged tires suitable for off-road and urban environments. The side profile reveals a long wheelbase and a reinforced chassis, while the rear view shows the open end of the cargo compartment, indicating it is designed for transporting goods or personnel. The truck's exterior is primarily composed of metal, with some rubber components on the tires and glass windows in the cab. The camouflage pattern consists of green, brown, and black patches, providing visual concealment in natural and urban settings. The vehicle appears to be a heavy-duty, utilitarian model, likely used for logistics or military transport.
description: A large, camouflage-painted cargo truck with a covered rear compartment, six rugged tires, and a robust metal cab. Designed for heavy-duty transport in urban or off-road environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing the boxy cab, windshield, grille, and side mirrors, with the covered cargo area extending behind.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the long wheelbase, three axles, and the full length of the covered cargo bed.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open end of the cargo compartment and the back of the chassis.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the cab, wheels, and the camouflage-covered cargo area.
